groups: I told my wife she drew her eyebrows high She looked surprised
Parallel lines have so much in common Its a shame they never meet
I threw a ball for my dog its a bit far But he is a good boy and enjoys it
I used to hate facial hair but then it grew on me
What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear!
I asked the librarian for books on fear She said they are in the horror section
What do you call a lazy kangaroo? A pouch potato!
I told a joke about paper its tearable
Why did the bicycle fall? It was two tired
I have a fear of speed bumps but Im slowly getting over it
What do you call a fish with no eyes? A fsh!
I used to play piano by ear now I use my hands
I stayed up all night to see the sun
